title: Web Developer
description: Web Developers build, style, and maintain websites and web applications. They write clean client-side (frontend) code, set up servers and databases (backend), and connect them to create interactive applications.

topics.name: HTML5 & CSS3 Structure & Styling
topics.description: Learn semantic HTML elements, responsive layouts using Flexbox/CSS Grid, and media queries.

topics.name: Introduction to JavaScript (ES6+)
topics.description: Understand core JS concepts: variables, functions, DOM manipulation, events, arrays, and objects.

topics.name: Responsive Design & Typography
topics.description: Design websites that look great on mobile, tablet, and desktop screens using responsive units.

topics.name: Asynchronous JavaScript
topics.description: Master Promises, Async/Await, and fetching API data using the Fetch API or Axios.

topics.name: Tailwind CSS or CSS Preprocessors
topics.description: Speed up styling using Tailwind CSS utility classes or learn Sass nesting, variables, and mixins.

topics.name: Git, GitHub & Web hosting
topics.description: Publish static websites using GitHub Pages, Netlify, or Vercel, and manage code changes.

topics.name: Frontend Frameworks (React.js)
topics.description: Learn React component life cycle, JSX, props, state, hooks (useState, useEffect), and routing.

topics.name: Node.js & Express.js Backend
topics.description: Build HTTP servers, handle routing, parse requests, write custom middleware, and use template engines like EJS.

topics.name: NoSQL Databases (MongoDB)
topics.description: Connect Node/Express apps to MongoDB databases using Mongoose ODM, define schemas, and run CRUD operations.

topics.name: Authentication & Security
topics.description: Implement user authentication using sessions, cookies, JSON Web Tokens (JWT), and hash passwords with bcrypt.

topics.name: RESTful & GraphQL APIs
topics.description: Create standards-compliant APIs and handle error validation, status codes, and JSON payloads.

topics.name: Full Stack Projects & Deployment
topics.description: Deploy full stack apps (Node + Mongo + React/EJS) on Render, Heroku, or Fly.io with proper env configuration.
